name: Indus Phase-16 — measure signature DoFs (legacy migration)
description: Retroactive migration of scripts/phase16/measure_signature_dofs.py into a one-node graph experiment so it appears in the Jobs panel and re-runs through the standard executor (per WARP.md rule G1). Measures the 8 free DoFs (zipf alpha/r2, MI gamma/r2, epistatic 2nd/3rd norm, h1 norm/nats) on the Phase-15 measured-corpora set and writes backend/glossa_lab/data/phase16_corpora/phase16_measured_dofs.json.
